data_quality_issues: Handled missing and duplicate features during preprocessing.
Standardized time-based features and lagged values before training.
overfitting_patterns: Compared raw and PCA-based regression scores to spot instability.
Tracked train/test behavior for classification and clustering models.
observations.deployment_speed: Artifacts are saved once and served through thin API endpoints.
observations.prefect_reliability: Local artifact logs provide a fallback when orchestration is unavailable.
